name: Pintura

seo.title: Pintura Review 2026: Pricing, Alternatives & Lock-in Score

review.verdict: Pintura is a Object Storage / Media API tool.
pros: Scalable, cost-effective storage for files and media
cons: Egress fees can dominate costs at high traffic
